content: Wire Pass 3: App.js routes + global KaelraPresence; index.js SW; index.html manifest; AppShell Timeline nav
voice.js: free browser speakLocal + mic-collision events
KaelraPresence: default-on, command router, mic-collision pause/resume

Backend cost: router.py Haiku (claude-haiku-4-5) for cheap tasks; chat.py gate actions_from_turn
Test frontend + backend (testing agent), fix reported bugs
